subcodes.first_line: O Lord of the exalted heavens, O Succorer of all humanity, O Refuge of the weak and Shelter of the poor, verily Thy servant Mustafá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رب السموات العلی و مغیث الوری و ملجا الضعفاء و ملاذ الفقراء ان عبدک مصطفی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for parents
